description:
Pngyu is a simple GUI front-end for [pngquant](https://chocolatey.org/packages/pngquant), a PNG lossy compressor, supporting palleted alpha transparency.

![Screenshot of Pngyu](http://nukesaq88.github.io/Pngyu/imgs/ss01.png)
summary: GUI frontend for pngquant, a lossy PNG compressor
author: nukesaq88
